'''Corthenians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Corthenia system/Legends|Corthenia system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], a Corthenian attended a [[hive ball]] with a [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] that was being held in honor of a pair of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] diplomats, [[Barrister]] [[Doolb Snoil]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
